summary: Iteration 114: Tested Daily Summary bug fixes (cross-branch expense filtering + timezone date handling), Anomaly Detection feature integration, and verified previous features (net columns, duplicate prevention). All 9 backend tests passed. All UI features verified working.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 114 verified all requested features. Daily summary bug fixes confirmed working with proper branch filtering (including expense_for_branch_id OR) and timezone handling ($lt next_day). Anomaly Detection fully integrated with dashboard widget and dedicated page.

1_daily_summary_branch_filter_bug_fix.details: GET /api/dashboard/daily-summary-range with branch_id now includes expenses where expense_for_branch_id matches the selected branch. API returns correct totals with $or query for cross-branch expenses.

2_daily_summary_timezone_bug_fix.details: Endpoint handles dates with +00:00 timezone suffix correctly using $lt next_day instead of $lte T23:59:59. Date range queries work properly.

3_daily_summary_net_columns.details: Day by Day view shows 'Net Cash' and 'Net Bank' columns. Headers confirmed: ['Date', 'Sales', 'Cash', 'Bank', 'Expenses', 'Cash', 'Bank', 'SP', 'Net Cash', 'Net Bank', 'Net']. Sample data: Totals Net Cash=SAR 675.00, Net Bank=SAR -24,000.00 with red styling for negative values.

4_anomaly_detection_scan_endpoint.details: GET /api/anomaly-detection/scan?days=30 returns proper structure: {scan: {total_anomalies, critical, warning, info, by_category}, anomalies: [...]}. Scan creates database record.

5_anomaly_detection_history_endpoint.details: GET /api/anomaly-detection/history returns array of previous scan records with scanned_at, total_anomalies, critical, warning, info counts.

6_anomaly_detection_schedule_endpoint.details: GET /api/anomaly-detection/schedule returns {enabled, frequency, period_days, alert_threshold, channels}.

7_anomaly_dashboard_widget.details: Dashboard shows Anomaly Detection widget (data-testid='anomaly-dashboard-widget') with last scan date (3/8/2026), anomaly counts (1 Critical, 13 Warning), and 'View Details' button linking to /anomaly-detection.

8_anomaly_detection_page.details: Full page at /anomaly-detection with: Run Scan button, period selector (Last 90 days), Auto-Scan Schedule settings (enabled, frequency, time, period, alert threshold, channels), Test Now button, Scan History showing multiple records with timestamps and anomaly breakdowns.

9_duplicate_prevention_regression.details: GET /api/sales/check-duplicate still works. Sales page shows 6 duplicate warning badges on Feb 27 and Feb 28 rows with orange styling. AlertDialog component configured for confirmation prompt.

screenshots.dashboard_with_anomaly_widget: Shows dashboard with Anomaly Detection widget showing 1 Critical, 13 Warning anomalies and View Details button
screenshots.anomaly_detection_page: Shows full Anomaly Detection page with Run Scan, Schedule Settings (Daily at 07:00, Warning+, push/whatsapp channels), and Scan History
screenshots.daily_summary_net_columns: Shows Range Summary (2026-03-01 to 2026-03-08) with Day by Day table including Net Cash (SAR 675.00) and Net Bank (SAR -24,000.00) columns
screenshots.sales_duplicate_warnings: Shows Sales page with duplicate badges on Feb 28 and Feb 27 rows (7 entries each)
